name: Tarragon Beef & Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces roast beef, cooked, sliced into strips
1/2 cup red onion, sliced 1/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni according to package directions. Rinse with cold water, drain, and refrigerate.
2. In a large bowl, stir together beef, celery, tomatoes, and red onion (separated into rings). Stir into macaroni. Refrigerate at least one hour.
3. In another bowl, stir together yogurt (I use non-fat), mayonnaise or salad dressing (I use light salad dressing), parsley, chives, tarragon (can substitute 1/4 teaspoon dried tarragon for fresh), salt, and pepper. Cover and refrigerate at least 1 hour.
4. Serve the salad in one of two ways:
a. Place onto plates or into bowls, and pour a spoonful of dressing over top without mixing it together.
b. Pour dressing over the entire salad and serve in a large bowl.
5. This dish is also delicious as a vegetarian option.
